onboarding.ariaLabel: Guided tour · first steps with Bassira

step1.title: Drop your first seed
step1.body: Upload an article, a report or a PDF · it's the starting point of your simulation. Bassira extracts actors, tensions and variables from it.
step1.bodyMissing: The upload zone isn't visible on this page yet. Scroll down to the simulation console to find it, then come back here.
step1.hint: No document handy? Click "Run an example" to explore a pre-configured Finance Bill simulation.

step2.title: Frame your strategic question
step2.body: Describe in one sentence what you want to test: a budget trade-off, a geopolitical risk, a sector crisis. The more specific, the better the calibration.
step2.bodyMissing: The question field will appear once the console loads. Continue the tour to see the next steps.
step2.hint: Example: "What impact will a VAT increase have on Moroccan household consumption in 2027?"

step3.title: Pick a suggested scenario or write your own
step3.body: Bassira reads your seed and proposes 3 framed scenarios (growth, risk, opportunity). Pick one · you can always tweak it.
step3.bodyMissing: Suggested scenarios will appear here once you've added a document or written your question. Move to the next step to see the launch button.
step3.hint: Scenarios are generated from your document · they reflect its real tensions, not a generic template.

step4.title: You're ready · launch your simulation
step4.body: The multi-agent system is primed to deliberate. The first run takes about 3 minutes · you'll watch the rounds unfold live.
step4.bodyMissing: The launch button appears once your seed and question are set. Prepare your inputs, then come back to start your first simulation.
step4.hint: You'll be able to replay, compare variants and export the final report as PDF.

hero.title: Stress-test your strategy before it touches reality.
hero.subtitle: The augmented foresight platform for MENA, Europe and Africaan decision-makers.
hero.descriptionPart1: Drop in anything · a press release, a news headline, a policy draft, a question you can't answer, a historical what-if · and
hero.descriptionPart3: that react to it hour by hour. Posting, arguing, trading, changing their minds.
hero.slogan: Don't predict the future. Simulate it

heroCta.orderAnalysisTitle: Request a quote for a custom strategic analysis
heroCta.runSimulationTitle: Open the private console to run a simulation manually

panel.readyDesc: First simulation in ~10 min, ~$1 on the Cheap preset. Drop in a doc or pick a trending headline to start.
panel.consoleSubtitle: Start by providing raw data or your initial hypotheses.

s1.title: You bring a scenario
s1.desc: Bassira builds the world around it · extracts actors, stakes, and open questions from your input.

s2.title: Hundreds of grounded agents
s2.desc: React on Twitter, Reddit, and a prediction market. Hour by hour, round after round.

s3.title: Steer the timeline
s3.desc: Chat with any agent. Drop breaking news mid-run. Fork a counterfactual and watch it diverge.

s4.title: Get a report
s4.desc: A Substack-style write-up of what happened, citing actual posts and trades from the run.

sectors.title: Strategic simulation that speaks your industry
sectors.subtitle: Every sector has its own tensions, its own actors, its own scenarios. Bassira models yours · not an average.

cardCta.viewModelTitle: See the simulation model preconfigured for this sector
cardCta.requestCustomTitle: Submit a custom-fit quote request for this sector

sectors.footerNote: Your industry isn't on this list?

finance.name: Banking & Finance
finance.tagline: Regulatory stress-tests, cross-border M&A, portfolio repositioning.
cases: What's the 18-month impact of a 50bp policy rate hike on our African corporate exposure?
Will our merger with [bank] survive Moroccan regulators, BCEAO, and European supervisors?

energy.name: Energy & Mining
energy.tagline: Energy transition, capex projects, geopolitics of resources.
cases: How will the renewable transition reshape positions of OCP, Sonatrach, ADNOC by 2030?
Will our rural electrification project in West Africa survive a post-election government change?

politics.name: Politics & Diplomacy
politics.tagline: Elections, reforms, international negotiations, parliamentary lobbying.
cases: Which factions will emerge from party X primaries in 18 months · and what's the surprise coalition probability?
Will our digital tax proposal pass the Moroccan Parliament against CGEM opposition?

retail.name: Retail & Distribution
retail.tagline: Product launch, geographic expansion, competitive war rooms.
cases: Will our food e-commerce launch in Morocco resist Marjane, Carrefour and Jumia simultaneously?
What sequence to open 12 stores in sub-Saharan Africa post-Covid for our regional group?

tech.name: Tech & Startup
tech.tagline: Strategic pivots, fundraising, market fit, positioning vs. GAFAM.
cases: Is our B2B SaaS pivot in the GCC zone well-timed against local consolidation?
How to position our Arabic LLM against OpenAI, Anthropic and Mistral for MENA institutions?

industry.name: Industry & Manufacturing
industry.tagline: Offshoring, automation, supply chains, international sanctions.
cases: Will our plant transfer from Casablanca to Tanger Med hold against European competitors' automation?
What's the impact of EU sanctions on Russia and China on our industrial supply chains?

media.name: Media & Communications
media.tagline: Reputational crisis management, editorial launches, diaspora audience strategy.
cases: How to manage the reputational scandal around our influencer partner before it hits our parent brand?
Will our new Darija video format capture the Moroccan diaspora in France, Spain and Belgium?

healthcare.name: Healthcare & Pharma
healthcare.tagline: Regulatory reimbursement, drug launches, ministerial negotiations.
cases: Will our chemo treatment reimbursement be granted by ANAM and CNOPS in the next 12 months?
Will our vaccine launch across 8 African countries be accepted by health ministries and WHO-Afro?

gallery.title: Quick Start Templates
gallery.oracleEnabled: Dispatch this template's oracle_tools against FeedOracle MCP before ingest.
gallery.oracleDisabled: Oracle seeds disabled server-side. Set ORACLE_SEED_ENABLED=true in .env to enable.

sheStart.variantATitle: Variant A · Ground Truth Replay (1 run, 10 weeks, 50 agents): compares the Bassira trajectory to the real She Start cohort.
sheStart.variantBTitle: Variant B · Cohort Twin (5 parallel runs, 10 weeks): measures the statistical stability of the scenarios.
sheStart.variantCTitle: Variant C · Blind Spot Hunt (1 run, 5 real leaders removed): exposes the model’s blind spots.

graphBuild.subtitle: Extracting entities and relations from your documents

ontology.title: Ontology Generation
ontology.description: LLM analyzes document content and simulation requirements, extracts reality seeds, and automatically generates a suitable ontology structure

graph.title: GraphRAG Build
graph.description: Based on the generated ontology, automatically chunks documents and builds a knowledge graph via Neo4j, extracting entities and relationships, forming temporal memory and community summaries

complete.title: Build Complete
complete.description: Graph build is complete. Please proceed to the next step for simulation agent setup.
complete.marketCountTitle: How many prediction markets to generate for this simulation
complete.disabledEmptyGraph: No entities extracted · click 'Add entities manually' below or go back.

emptyGraph.title: Empty graph · no entities extracted
emptyGraph.desc: The knowledge graph contains no actors. The simulation cannot start without agents.
emptyGraph.cause1: Scanned or image-only PDF · no extractable text layer
emptyGraph.cause2: Document too short or too generic · the LLM found no entities
emptyGraph.cause3: LLM key not configured · ontology generation failed silently
emptyGraph.ctaBack: Go back and use another document

refineContext.title: Refine context
refineContext.description: Refine the initial context to enrich the simulation: key actors, geography, time horizon, tensions, and expected stakeholders. All fields are optional.
refineContext.saveFailedFallback: Saved locally, but the server did not confirm receipt.

keyActors.label: Key actors
keyActors.help: Central people, brands, or organizations (max 8, 60 chars each).

geoLocale.label: Geographic scope
geoLocale.help: Target market or country for the simulation.

timeHorizon.label: Time horizon
timeHorizon.help: Total duration covered by the simulation.

keyTensions.label: Key tensions
keyTensions.help: Conflicts, controversies, or friction points to anticipate (max 200 chars).
keyTensions.placeholder: e.g. mistrust towards the brand, regional political polarisation…

expectedStakeholders.label: Expected stakeholders
expectedStakeholders.help: Groups or roles the LLM should represent in the simulation (max 8).

review.title: Review & refine entities
review.helpText: Inspect the entities your knowledge graph extracted. Rename ambiguous ones, merge duplicates (e.g. ‘CEO’ and ‘chief_executive_officer’), delete the noise, or add a key actor that was missed. These corrections feed directly into the agent profile generator.

banner.title: Step 1.5 · Review your entities
banner.description: Before generating agents, inspect the graph: rename, merge, delete duplicates, or add a missing actor.

panel.noSelectionHelp: Click any row in the list to inspect its details and adjust its status.
panel.notesPlaceholder: Record the reason for the flag or removal…

summary.minRequired: At least 3 valid entities are required to launch the simulation.

add.newTypeTitle: Add an entity with a custom type
add.newTypeHelp: Use this when none of the existing types match. Type names accept letters, digits, and underscores only.

footer.noChanges: No pending changes · feel free to skip.

validation.invalidType: Type must contain at least one letter, digit, or underscore.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.loadFailed: Failed to load entities for this graph.
error.graphNotBuilt: Graph not built yet for this project.

review.empty: No entities have been extracted yet. The graph build may have produced an empty result · go back and rebuild from your documents.

step1.title: Simulation Instance Initialization
step1.description: Create a new simulation instance and fetch simulation world parameter templates

step2.title: Generate Agent Profiles
step2.description: Combines context to automatically invoke tools, organize entities and relationships from the knowledge graph, initialize simulated individuals, and assign them unique behaviors and memories based on reality seeds
step2.addAgentBioPlaceholder: Describe this agent's viewpoint, values, authority sources...

step3.title: Generate Simulation Config
step3.description: LLM intelligently configures world time flow, recommendation algorithms, each individual's active time periods, posting frequency, event triggers, and other parameters based on simulation requirements and reality seeds
step3.errorHint: Unexpected error. Check backend logs or contact support.
step3.hintEntities: The Neo4j graph contains no usable entities. Go back to step 1 to rebuild the graph from the document, then restart the simulation.
step3.hintProfiles: Agent profiles have not been generated. The retry button requires a successful /prepare first · recreate the simulation from scratch.
step3.hintTimeout: The LLM did not respond within the timeout (90 s). Check the provider's availability (Moonshot Kimi) and retry.
step3.hintLLM: LLM issue: invalid API key, quota exceeded, or model not found. Check backend environment variables (LLM_API_KEY, LLM_MODEL_NAME, LLM_BASE_URL).

step4.title: Initial Activation Orchestration
step4.description: Based on narrative direction, automatically generate initial activation events and hot topics to guide the initial state of the simulation world

step5.title: Preparation Complete
step5.description: Simulation environment is ready, you can start running the simulation
step5.roundSettingsDesc: Bassira automatically plans to simulate {hours} hours of reality, each round represents {min} minutes of elapsed time
step5.firstTimeTip: First time? Switch to ‘Custom Mode’ to reduce rounds for a quick preview ➝

errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Internal server error. Please try again in a moment.

errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before retrying.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Authentication required. Check your admin token.
errors.ADMIN_AUTH_NOT_CONFIGURED: Admin authentication is not configured on this deployment.
errors.UNKNOWN_PACKAGE: This package is not available for direct payment.
errors.STRIPE_NOT_CONFIGURED: Online payment is not available right now.
errors.STRIPE_API_ERROR: Could not start the payment. Please try again shortly.
errors.SIMULATION_NOT_READY: Simulation is not ready yet. Run the prepare phase first.
errors.SIMULATION_ALREADY_RUNNING: Simulation is already running. Stop it before restarting.
errors.SIMULATION_NOT_PUBLIC: Simulation must be public for this action.
errors.SIMULATION_ENV_UNAVAILABLE: Simulation environment could not be started. Please try again.
errors.GRAPH_NOT_BUILT: The graph has not been built yet. Run the « Build graph » phase first.
errors.GRAPH_BUILD_IN_PROGRESS: Graph build is in progress. Wait or use force=true to restart.
errors.GRAPH_EMPTY: The selected graph contains no defined entities. Rebuild the graph from a document before launching a simulation.
errors.GRAPH_CHECK_FAILED: Could not verify the graph state right now. The Neo4j service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in 30 seconds.
errors.INVALID_DIFF: The refinement diff is invalid or inconsistent.
errors.ONTOLOGY_NOT_GENERATED: Ontology not yet generated. Call /ontology/generate first.
errors.ONTOLOGY_NOT_FOUND: Ontology not found for this project.
errors.EXTRACTED_TEXT_NOT_FOUND: Extracted text from documents is not available.
errors.URL_FETCH_FAILED: Could not fetch content from this URL.
errors.PROFILES_MISSING: Agent profiles are missing. Run /prepare first.
errors.CONFIG_NOT_GENERATED: Simulation configuration does not exist yet. Run /prepare first.
errors.STORAGE_UNAVAILABLE: Neo4j storage is unavailable. Check the connection and try again.
errors.STORAGE_ERROR: Storage write error. Please try again.
errors.LLM_TIMEOUT: The LLM did not respond in time. Retry in 1–2 minutes.
errors.LLM_AUTH_ERROR: LLM authentication failed. Check backend environment variables.
errors.LLM_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: LLM quota exceeded. Check your subscription.
errors.LLM_MODEL_NOT_FOUND: LLM model not found. Check the model name in settings.
errors.LLM_UNAVAILABLE: LLM service is unavailable. Check configuration and try again.
errors.LLM_GENERATION_FAILED: LLM generation failed. Retry or switch model.
errors.LLM_TEST_FAILED: LLM test failed. Check API key and model.
errors.INTERVIEW_TIMEOUT: Interview timed out. The agent did not respond in time.
errors.CHAT_FAILED: Chat with the report agent failed.
errors.POLYMARKET_NOT_ENABLED: Polymarket is not enabled for this simulation.

hero.title: Strategic intelligence protocols for decision-makers.
hero.subtitle: Ten engagement formats · from rapid resilience tests to digital twin simulations. MAD / USD, delivered in 24 h to 4 weeks.

pmf_discovery.name: PMF Discovery
pmf_discovery.description: Validate your product-market fit before your first round. 50 synthetic target prospects across pan-Africa stress-test your value proposition over 10 weeks.

crisis_drill_24h.name: Crisis Drill 24h
crisis_drill_24h.description: Stress-test your next reputation crisis 24 hours before it lands. 50 synthetic citizens react hour-by-hour on Twitter, Reddit, and WhatsApp.

bullets.b4: Top 3 reply messages at H+1, H+4, H+12

adcheck_lite.name: Adcheck Lite
adcheck_lite.description: Test 2 ad concepts on a synthetic Moroccan 25-45 audience. Verdict in 72h, ideal for fast iteration before media buy.

adcheck_pro.name: Adcheck Pro
adcheck_pro.description: 3 ad concepts tested in depth on 80 segmented agents. For Ramadan campaigns, regional launches, or strategic pivots.

product_launch.name: Product Launch B2C
product_launch.description: Simulate one week of B2C product launch pan-Africa with adoption trajectory + early-adopter churn peak at D+5.

bullets.b2: Adoption curve per day (D+1 to D+7)
bullets.b5: Top 3 signals to monitor in real-time

policy_stress.name: Policy Stress Test
policy_stress.description: Stress test of a draft law or policy brief against political opposition, stakeholders, and authorities. For cabinet advisors and think tanks.

bullets.b5: Top 3 arguments that don't hold in real-life

cohort_replay.name: Cohort Replay
cohort_replay.description: Scientific replication of a real cohort (incubator, programme, accelerator) over 10 weeks with 3 A/B/C variants to measure scenario stability.

bullets.b1: 50 agents grounded on a real cohort
bullets.b2: Variant A · Ground Truth Replay (1 run)
bullets.b3: Variant B · Cohort Twin (5 parallel runs)
bullets.b4: Variant C · Blind Spot Hunt (5 leaders removed)

crisis_watch.name: Crisis Watch
crisis_watch.description: Permanent comms-director watch and 24/7 monitoring. 1 Crisis Drill per month included + early-warning alerts on weak signals.

bullets.b5: SLA response under 4h in case of incident

brand_pulse.name: Brand Pulse
brand_pulse.description: Unlimited Adcheck + continuous sentiment tracking + competitor benchmark. For brand managers and CMOs in test-and-learn mode.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: For ministries, multinationals, funds, research programmes: custom configuration with regional personas, composed scenarios, API integration.

brier.title: Transparent method
brier.body: Every report publishes its method and its limits — what the simulation covers, and what it does not predict.

multiLocale.title: Multi-locale FR/AR/EN
multiLocale.body: Native comprehension across French, Arabic, and English nuances.

africaData.title: Africa-grounded data
africaData.body: Agents trained on deeply contextualized, localized datasets.

syntheticVsSurvey.question: How does a synthetic audience differ from a traditional survey?
syntheticVsSurvey.answer: Our synthetic agents don't just answer multiple-choice questions; they hold persistent beliefs, interact with each other, and simulate belief drift over time based on specific stimuli, providing deeper behavioral insights than static surveys.

bindingDeliverable.question: What is a "binding deliverable"?
bindingDeliverable.answer: A binding deliverable means we guarantee the exact outputs listed in your package (e.g., 6h PDF summary, heat-map) within the specified timeframe. No scope creep, no hidden fees.

customizePersonas.question: Can we customize the personas?
customizePersonas.answer: Yes. During onboarding, we calibrate the standard archetypes provided in the package to align closely with your specific target audience or stakeholder matrix.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the simulation, really?
accuracy.answer: Our simulations do not predict the real world: they stress-test a decision by modelling multi-agent opinion dynamics in depth. The full methodology and its limits are published on the /methodologie page.

africaGroundedData.question: What does "Africa-grounded data" actually mean?
africaGroundedData.answer: Most foundational models default to Western cultural contexts. We specifically tune our agent parameters using regional socio-economic data, dialect nuances, and local media consumption patterns for accurate regional simulations.

enterpriseRetainers.question: Do you offer enterprise retainers?
enterpriseRetainers.answer: Yes, for high-frequency needs, we offer custom platform access and continuous monitoring packages. Please contact our sales team to discuss enterprise scaling.

help.title: Not sure which one fits?
help.body: Tell us your situation, we route you to the right package.

quote.trustBanner: Your message goes directly to the founders. No CRM noise. No newsletter.

crisis.title: I'm in a crisis or about to be
crisis.sub: Rapid response simulation for emerging threats.

policy.title: I need to test a policy or regulation

campaign.title: I'm about to launch a campaign or product
campaign.sub: Anticipate market reaction and agent adoption.

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent Intelligence

airGapped.title: Air-Gapped Privacy

fastSetup.title: 48h Setup

hero.title: Strengthen your scenarios with computational simulation

process.title: How the collaboration unfolds
process.subtitle: A three-step protocol that preserves your methodology and augments it with a computational layer.

step1.title: Your qualitative scenarios
step1.body: You provide your hypotheses, analytical frameworks and strategic parameters.

step2.title: Multi-agent stress-test
step2.body: Bassira instantiates your hypotheses in simulations involving thousands of cognitive agents.

step3.title: Co-branded report
step3.body: You receive a quantified synthesis carrying your brand and the Bassira methodological reference.

tiers.title: Three partnership models
tiers.subtitle: Each model preserves your editorial independence and your prior publications.

research.body: For think tanks and academic institutions seeking to validate their scenarios.

integration.title: Integration Partner

whitelabel.title: White-label
whitelabel.body: For organisations deploying their own foresight platform under their brand.

testimonials.title: Partner program · first circle

testimonials.ndaNotice: Detailed references available on request, under NDA.

contact.fallbackNote: You can also write to us directly at

hero.title: Stress-test your strategy in 48 hours · without a consulting firm or another Excel guesswork.
hero.subtitle: Bassira simulates thousands of agents calibrated for MENA, Europe and Africaan markets to surface your blind spots before the next crisis.
hero.trust: Used by strategy leaders across Africa, the Middle East and Europe

pains.title: 3 reasons why your strategic decisions miss the target

speed.quote: Our Excel scenarios are too slow and too brittle to keep up with the market.
speed.solution: Simulate 10,000 agent interactions in 5 minutes, with a fully auditable trace of every assumption.

blindspot.quote: We are flying blind on geopolitical shocks and supply-chain disruptions.
blindspot.solution: Stress-test your plan against 50+ exogenous variables · FX, sanctions, climate, social · calibrated for MENA.

cost.quote: Consulting firms charge six figures for slides full of unverifiable assumptions.
cost.solution: Get institutional-grade rigor, time-stamped stress-tests and a public methodology, at a fraction of the cost.

product.title: A simulation platform calibrated for the markets you actually operate in.
product.lead: Bassira combines 5,000+ distinct cognitive profiles, MENA + Europe specific calibration and an air-gapped mode for your most sensitive data.

agents.title: Multi-agent intelligence
agents.desc: 5,000+ distinct cognitive profiles · decision-makers, operators, regulators, crowds · calibrated on decades of observed behavior.

calibrated.title: MENA + Europe calibration
calibrated.desc: Models tuned for Morocco, GCC, France and the UK. No Silicon-Valley bias · your assumptions hold against local reality.

sovereign.title: Air-gapped privacy
sovereign.desc: Your scenarios never feed public training corpora. Full data sovereignty, optional on-premise deployment.

proof.title: Published method · documented limits · verifiable.
proof.context: A “Method & limits” section in every report
proof.body: A Bassira simulation does not predict the real world: it stress-tests your decision — objections, opinion dynamics, failure scenarios. The full method and its limits are published, and every report embeds them.

pricing.title: Three formats. Zero hidden assumptions.
pricing.subtitle: From a discovery sprint to a permanent strategic twin · pick the engagement that fits your decision horizon.

discovery.name: PMF Discovery
discovery.blurb: Validate product-market-fit on a new segment before committing capital.

drill.name: Crisis Drill 24h
drill.blurb: Simulate a crisis (cyber, FX, geopolitical) and surface your three biggest vulnerabilities in 24 hours.

twin.name: Strategic Twin
twin.blurb: A digital twin of your market, continuously updated, plugged into your strategy committee.

finalCta.title: Your next strategic decision deserves better than a spreadsheet.

methodology.title: How this model is calibrated and audited

methodologie.title: How a Bassira simulation works
methodologie.sub: Full transparency: what the simulation does, how, and where its conclusions stop.

pipeline.title: From your document to the report
pipeline.step1: Your document or question is turned into a knowledge graph (entities, relationships, context).
pipeline.step2: Hundreds of AI personas are generated and calibrated on the scenario.
pipeline.step3: They interact hour by hour in simulated arenas: social networks, debates, opinion dynamics.
pipeline.step4: Signals are aggregated into a map of reactions, objections and fault lines.
pipeline.step5: An executive report is written, with its built-in “Method & limits” section.

get.title: What you get
get.c1b: The objections and angles of attack likely to emerge — before you meet them in the real world.
get.c2b: Who opposes, who supports, who swings, and around which arguments.
get.c3b: How the debate structures itself and where fault lines form.
get.c4b: Fork the simulation (“what if…?”) to compare several versions of your decision.

not.title: What Bassira does not do
not.n1b: Synthetic personas do not replace the real world. The simulation explores possibilities; it does not announce what will happen.
not.n2b: Stress-testing complements real surveys and interviews; it does not substitute for them on a binding decision.
not.n3b: Results vary with the AI model used and the configuration. Every report documents its conditions and limits.

anchor.title: Grounding on real data (optional)
anchor.body: A simulation can be calibrated with real signals (monitoring, market data) and your own data (short survey, interviews). The report then states precisely what it is grounded on.
